field_conditions_target_xor.name: field_conditions_target_xor

("field_conditions"."target_field_id" IS NOT NULL AND "field_conditions"."target_section_id" IS NULL)
         OR ("field_conditions"."target_field_id" IS NULL AND "field_conditions"."target_section_id" IS NOT NULL)
